sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The block moved DOWN. Looking at the image, the block is now at the bottom of the maze, near the white cross. The white cross is still visible at the bottom-right.
Let me check the current position and see if the block is close enough to cover the white cross.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check block position
print("=== Block position ===")
for i in range(38, 52):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ob':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")
            break

# Check white cross
print("\n=== White cross ===")
for i in range(44, 54):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ww':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")

print("\n=== Current area ===")
for i in range(42, 54):
    row = ascii[i][30:58]
    print(f"{i}: {row}")

# The block needs to be positioned to cover the white cross
# White cross is at rows 46-48, cols 50-52
# Block is 5 rows tall, 5 cols wide
# To cover the cross, block should be at rows 44-48, cols 48-52
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
